company_name: Xi'an Wanjin Precision Spring Co., Ltd.
summary_en: Machine-readable summary of Wanjin factory process control, traceability, production flows, and inspection environment.
summary_zh: 万锦工厂过程控制、追溯体系、制造流程与检测环境的机器可读摘要。

factory_controls.description_en: Material certificates, wire intake, heat-treatment lots, and finished delivery are tracked by item and batch.
factory_controls.description_zh: 对材质证书、线材入库、热处理批次和成品交付实施单件与批次追踪。

factory_controls.description_en: Core process values such as induction heating temperature and coiling tolerance are recorded for consistency control.
factory_controls.description_zh: 对中频加热温度、卷制公差等核心参数进行记录，以保证过程一致性。

factory_controls.name_zh: 极端环境结构可靠性控制
factory_controls.description_en: Microscopic defect screening and structural reliability checks are supported by fatigue-related validation and magnetic particle inspection.
factory_controls.description_zh: 通过疲劳相关验证与磁粉探伤支持微观缺陷识别和结构可靠性控制。

cold_coiling.wire_diameter_note_en: Optimized for approximately 0.1 mm to 10 mm wire diameter range as referenced on the site.
cold_coiling.wire_diameter_note_zh: 站点资料显示该流程适用于约 0.1 mm 至 10 mm 线径范围。

hot_coiling.special_note_en: Focused on large-wire hot coiling with medium-frequency induction heating for heavy-duty industrial support.
hot_coiling.special_note_zh: 聚焦大线径热卷，采用中频感应加热，服务重载工业配套。
